script: echo === Heather AAD lookup ===; az ad user list --filter "startswith(givenName,'Heather')" --query "[].{id:id, displayName:displayName, upn:userPrincipalName, mail:mail}" -o json 2>&1; echo; echo === Heather teams-app dir ===; sudo find /home -maxdepth 3 -name 'manifest.json' -path '*heather*' 2>/dev/null | head -5; echo; echo === Vault keys for heather ===; az keyvault secret list --vault-name SDN-YooVault --query '[].name' -o tsv 2>&1 | grep -i heather
